message.content:
I'll describe this construction company website header section in detail, breaking down every visual element:

## Header Section

**Background:**
- A dark, professional background image showing a modern building facade (appears to be a high-rise building with glass/steel construction)
- The background has a dark overlay (approximately 60-70% opacity) creating a sophisticated, professional atmosphere

**Logo & Branding:**
- Top-left corner: "NOW & ALWAYS" in bold white uppercase letters
- Below it: "CONSTRUCTION" in smaller white uppercase letters
- To the left of the text: A blue square logo with a white stylized "N" inside

**Navigation Menu:**
- Horizontal menu bar with 5 items, all in white text:
  - HOME (appears to be highlighted in blue)
  - ABOUT
  - SERVICES
  - PROJECTS
  - CONTACT

**Call to Action Button:**
- Top-right corner: Blue rectangular button with white text "CALL NOW"
- Contains a white phone icon on the left side of the text

**Company Information:**
- Below the logo: "NOW AND ALWAYS (PTY) LTD" in blue uppercase text

**Main Heading:**
- Large, bold white text: "COMPREHENSIVE CONSTRUCTION & MAINTENANCE SOLUTIONS"
- This is the primary headline of the page

**Subheading:**
- Smaller white text: "High-quality services for projects of any scale, nationwide. Trusted by clients across South Africa for over 5 years."

**Action Buttons:**
- Three buttons in a row:
  1. Blue button: "GET A FREE QUOTE" with a white arrow icon
  2. Black outline button: "CALL US" with a white phone icon
  3. Black outline button: "WHATSAPP" with a white WhatsApp icon

**Footer Notice:**
- At the bottom: Dark text on a slightly lighter background: "Frontend Preview Only. Please wake servers to enable backend functionality."
- Next to it: Green button with white text: "Wake up servers"
- Far right: Small text with an icon: "Made with Emergent"

## Color Scheme:
- Primary: Blue (#0066CC or similar)
- Secondary: White
- Background: Dark (almost black) with building image
- Accent: Green for the "Wake up servers" button

## Typography:
- Modern, clean sans-serif font throughout
- Hierarchy clearly established with different font sizes and weights

This appears to be a professional construction company website with a strong focus on trust and reliability, emphasizing their comprehensive services and nationwide reach. The design uses a dark, sophisticated color scheme with blue accents to convey professionalism and trustworthiness.
